title: Your Guide to Sustainability at Dreamforce
author: Kelly Chartrand

sections.heading: Introduction
sections.text: Dreamforce is almost here, and we’re committed to reducing waste, sourcing responsibly, and designingthe world’slargest and most trusted AI eventwith intention. Whether you’ll be attending virtually or onsite in San Francisco, here’s how sustainability is coming to life at Dreamforce — and how you can get involved. We’ll cover: Sustainability sessions at DreamforceOnsite sustainability at DreamforceBehind-the-scenes sustainability at DreamforceTake sustainability beyond Dreamforce

inline_links.text: largest and most trusted AI event

sections.heading: Sustainability sessions at Dreamforce
sections.text: From sessions with bold sustainability leaders to emerging ecopreneurs, this year’s Dreamforce showcases the power of innovation and collective action for a more sustainable future. Not able to attend in person this year? No worries! All of these sessions will be available onSalesforce+, so you can still catch the Dreamforce magic from home. Honoring Jane Goodall: Conservation in Action:In memory of the late Jane Goodall, conservation activists and special guests discuss her legacy as well as the part all of us have to play in leaving behind a better world. Dreampitch: AI for the Earth’s Future: Trailblazing entrepreneurs pitch AI-powered solutions to global challenges, from climate change to economic growth. Judges weigh in, but the audience casts the final vote in this live competition. Inside Amazon and Google’s Vision to Power AI Sustainably: AI drives innovation, but also a growing environmental cost. Hear from Amazon and Google’s Chief Sustainability officers as they explore how to scale responsibly—aligning tech growth with a thriving planet. AI for Impact: Scaling Solutions for People and Planet: Learn how bold leaders are using AI to tackle global challenges, from climate to education, and proving that purposeful tech can drive real, far-reaching impact. How Agentforce Supports Sustainability for Sales: Customers want to know what Salesforce is doing for sustainability — and agents are here to help. Learn how Salesforce uses agents to answer customer sustainability questions and deliver insights, fast. See the Future of Agentforce Net Zero: What’s next for Agentforce Net Zero? Learn how Salesforce is using soon-to-be-released features to transform sustainability data into business strategy, cutting costs and highlighting new investments. Get Audit-Ready Data Assurance with Net Zero Cloud: Hear how a healthcare leader’s sustainability experts used Net Zero Cloud to streamline their assurance process, gaining improved data quality, transparency, and a simpler audit trail. Back to top.

sections.heading: Onsite sustainability at Dreamforce
sections.text: Attending Dreamforce in person this year? Here are a few steps you can take to accelerate a net zero, nature positive future and reduce your footprint onsite. Plant native seedlings in honor of Dr. Jane Goodall.Join us by Dreamforce Gives on Howard Street to honor Jane’s legacy. You can help plant native seedlings to build climate resilience in San Francisco, learn more about theJane Goodall Institute, and get involved with the Trillion Trees movement through1t.org. Compost, don’t waste.All of our meal packaging is 100% compostable. We have staff posted in lunch areas to help you sort your waste correctly. Recycle your badge.Salesforce is offering badge and lanyard recycling. Once the event is over, leave your badge and lanyard in the specially designated badge/lanyard recycling bins, and we’ll make sure they get recycled. Spare the air.We encourage all attendees to walk, take public transport, or order an EV/hybrid rideshare to go to and from Dreamforce at Moscone Center and Dreamfest at the Chase Center. Bike bliss.Bike valet makes it easy and worry-free to bike to Dreamforce. Just leave your bike at the free bike valet located behind Moscone South.

sections.heading: Behind-the-scenes sustainability at Dreamforce
sections.text: Here’s a peek at some of the behind-the-scenes work we’re doing to make this year’s Dreamforce more sustainable. Digital over print.We’ve eliminated almost all printed materials except those provided in interactive sessions such as hands-on-trainings, workshops, and roundtables. We’re replacing printed paper with digital assets, making it easier for you to save and share helpful information while reducing our environmental impact. We nurture nature.All of the live trees and shrubs at Salesforce events are reused and continue to sequester carbon. Donation nation.We avoid landfills and support nonprofits through a robust donation program. Additionally, many of our custom built structures will be reused at future Salesforce events. Back to top.

sections.text: Feeling inspired? Us, too! Don’t let your sustainability journey end here. Check outSustainability on the 360 Blogto find our latest content, industry insights, and product news in one place. Plus, learn more aboutNet Zero Cloudand Salesforce’s ownsustainabilityjourney.

raw_html:
Dreamforce is almost here, and we’re committed to reducing waste, sourcing responsibly, and designing the world’s largest and most trusted AI event with intention. Whether you’ll be attending virtually or onsite in San Francisco, here’s how sustainability is coming to life at Dreamforce — and how you can get involved.

We’ll cover:

  • Sustainability sessions at Dreamforce
  • Onsite sustainability at Dreamforce
  • Behind-the-scenes sustainability at Dreamforce
  • Take sustainability beyond Dreamforce

Sustainability sessions at Dreamforce

From sessions with bold sustainability leaders to emerging ecopreneurs, this year’s Dreamforce showcases the power of innovation and collective action for a more sustainable future.

Not able to attend in person this year? No worries! All of these sessions will be available on Salesforce+, so you can still catch the Dreamforce magic from home.

Honoring Jane Goodall: Conservation in Action: In memory of the late Jane Goodall, conservation activists and special guests discuss her legacy as well as the part all of us have to play in leaving behind a better world.

Dreampitch: AI for the Earth’s Future: Trailblazing entrepreneurs pitch AI-powered solutions to global challenges, from climate change to economic growth. Judges weigh in, but the audience casts the final vote in this live competition.

Inside Amazon and Google’s Vision to Power AI Sustainably: AI drives innovation, but also a growing environmental cost. Hear from Amazon and Google’s Chief Sustainability officers as they explore how to scale responsibly—aligning tech growth with a thriving planet.

Does your AI strategy include sustainability?

Explore our 3-step guide to starting and scaling your AI sustainability strategy.

Read now

AI for Impact: Scaling Solutions for People and Planet: Learn how bold leaders are using AI to tackle global challenges, from climate to education, and proving that purposeful tech can drive real, far-reaching impact. 

How Agentforce Supports Sustainability for Sales: Customers want to know what Salesforce is doing for sustainability — and agents are here to help. Learn how Salesforce uses agents to answer customer sustainability questions and deliver insights, fast. 

See the Future of Agentforce Net Zero: What’s next for Agentforce Net Zero? Learn how Salesforce is using soon-to-be-released features to transform sustainability data into business strategy, cutting costs and highlighting new investments.

Get Audit-Ready Data Assurance with Net Zero Cloud: Hear how a healthcare leader’s sustainability experts used Net Zero Cloud to streamline their assurance process, gaining improved data quality, transparency, and a simpler audit trail.

Back to top.

Sustainability at Salesforce

Get started with Agentforce Net Zero

Where nature meets AI: Salesforce’s model for impact innovation

Explore sustainability at Salesforce

Meet the digital workforce scaling up sustainability and climate disaster response

Onsite sustainability at Dreamforce

Attending Dreamforce in person this year? Here are a few steps you can take to accelerate a net zero, nature positive future and reduce your footprint onsite.

Plant native seedlings in honor of Dr. Jane Goodall. Join us by Dreamforce Gives on Howard Street to honor Jane’s legacy. You can help plant native seedlings to build climate resilience in San Francisco, learn more about the Jane Goodall Institute, and get involved with the Trillion Trees movement through 1t.org.  

Compost, don’t waste. All of our meal packaging is 100% compostable. We have staff posted in lunch areas to help you sort your waste correctly.

Recycle your badge. Salesforce is offering badge and lanyard recycling. Once the event is over, leave your badge and lanyard in the specially designated badge/lanyard recycling bins, and we’ll make sure they get recycled.

Spare the air. We encourage all attendees to walk, take public transport, or order an EV/hybrid rideshare to go to and from Dreamforce at Moscone Center and Dreamfest at the Chase Center.

Bike bliss. Bike valet makes it easy and worry-free to bike to Dreamforce. Just leave your bike at the free bike valet located behind Moscone South.

Behind-the-scenes sustainability at Dreamforce

Here’s a peek at some of the behind-the-scenes work we’re doing to make this year’s Dreamforce more sustainable.

Digital over print. We’ve eliminated almost all printed materials except those provided in interactive sessions such as hands-on-trainings, workshops, and roundtables. We’re replacing printed paper with digital assets, making it easier for you to save and share helpful information while reducing our environmental impact.

We nurture nature. All of the live trees and shrubs at Salesforce events are reused and continue to sequester carbon.

Donation nation. We avoid landfills and support nonprofits through a robust donation program. Additionally, many of our custom built structures will be reused at future Salesforce events.

Back to top.

Take sustainability beyond Dreamforce

Feeling inspired? Us, too! Don’t let your sustainability journey end here.

Check out Sustainability on the 360 Blog to find our latest content, industry insights, and product news in one place. Plus, learn more about Net Zero Cloud and Salesforce’s own sustainability journey. 

Collective action is the only way forward.

Learn more about sustainability and impact at Salesforce.

Our Journey
